steps.title: Compare the two examples
steps.content: Taylor-Reed emphasized his mixed-race ancestry by calling himself Anglo-African. The next sentence gives another way he foregrounded African heritage: incorporating traditional African sounds into his classical compositions.

steps.title: Choose an additive transition
steps.content: B would correct the previous idea, C would contrast with it, and D would show something happening despite it. The second example adds to the same pattern. The answer is A.
